results.title: Sign in - Google Accounts
results.full_content:
Google

# Sign in

with your Google Account. This account will be available to other Google apps in the browser.

[Forgot email?](https://notebooklm.google.com/signin/usernamerecovery?continue=https://notebooklm.google.com/login?continue%3Dhttps://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/5b8ae55e-d6bf-4cde-afb2-33492c1b241b&dsh=S168474319:1784231942842293&flowEntry=ServiceLogin&flowName=WebLiteSignIn&followup=https://notebooklm.google.com/login?continue%3Dhttps://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/5b8ae55e-d6bf-4cde-afb2-33492c1b241b&ifkv=Ac50bxsEY_3hXAhfUcEJFwufWDIjpL__DKMseGxIZ-Oc_f2FqLNrUL4B5mr5dBacOyh_E-4wmNIsyw&osid=1)

Not your computer? Use a private browsing window to sign in. [Learn more about using Guest mode](https://support.google.com/accounts?p=signin_privatebrowsing&hl=en-US)

Next
